sunset_risk_tight.text: Caution: arrival is close to sunset. Maintain current pace and do not stop for long.

sunset_risk_warning.text: Warning: you are at risk of arriving after sunset. Driving after dark is not permitted in Namibia. Consider stopping at the next safe town.
